svg.text: parser.js · runner.js · memory.js · git.js · telegram.js · email-poller.js · reply.js
gemini uses -p flag — prevents interactive / agentic hang on stdin
cloneLocks{} is an in-memory promise per repo — prevents parallel clone race
allowUnsafeSshCommand: true required in simple-git for custom SSH keys
GEMINI_CLI_TRUST_WORKSPACE hardcoded in SPAWN_ENV, not delegated to .env
git ops auto-inject gitLog(repo, 5) as context into the next AI prompt
